title: ctenitis subdryopteris
intro: Ctenitis subdryopteris, also known as the Japanese wood fern or Japanese autumn fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in China and Japan, due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Ctenitis subdryopteris include its potential to treat conditions such as high blood pressure, arthritis, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. Ctenitis subdryopteris can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
